_comment: Evidence-gallery manifest. Each entry shows up in slide 3 of the guided tour and in the /evidence page. SAFETY: every image listed here MUST be redacted (faces blurred, full names removed) before commit. Raw imgur/Drive URLs are NOT acceptable.

items.title: (no evidence images committed yet)
items.caption: Drop redacted PNG/JPG screenshots into static/evidence/ and add an entry here. See manifest schema below.
items.source_note: Schema example only -- not an actual asset.

_schema.title: short headline (will be displayed)
_schema.caption: 1-2 sentence description of what is shown + why it is evidence
_schema.category: doxxing | passport_collateral | recruitment_fraud | kafala | predatory_lending | other
_schema.redaction_status: REDACTED (faces blurred, names removed) | UNREDACTED (NEVER COMMIT)
_schema.source_note: where the original came from (public FB page, NGO submission, etc.) -- NO URLs to live posts
